loginStaffLink: Event staff? Sign in with your QR card →
authErrorInvalidCredentials: Incorrect email/code or password. Please try again.
authErrorServer: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
authErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
homeEmptyBody: Create your first event to start importing attendees and printing badges.
createEventDatesOrder: End date can't be before the start date.
createEventServerError: Couldn't create the event. Please try again.
placeholderComingSoon: This section is coming in a later phase.
workspaceOverviewSubtitle: Everything your team needs before doors open.
workspaceNextAttendees: Import your attendee list to start printing badges.
workspaceNextBadge: Design the badge template in the editor.
workspaceNextStaff: Assign staff and print their QR login cards.
workspaceNextEquipment: Connect the venue printer and run a test print.
workspaceAllReady: Everything's ready — launch check-in from the header when doors open.
workspaceUnlockHint: Finish the badge and run a test print to unlock check-in.
workspaceLaunchComingSoonTitle: Launch ceremony arrives with the check-in station
workspaceLaunchComingSoonBody: Confirming the event, loading station settings and the printer check land in a later update.
settingsSaveError: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
settingsDatesCannotClear: Clearing a date isn't supported yet.
settingsFontsSubtitle: Custom fonts for badge templates — available in the editor's font picker for this event.
settingsFontsEmpty: No custom fonts yet — the badge editor uses the built-in font until you add one.
settingsFontRemoveBody: "{{name}}" disappears from the editor's font picker. Badges already printed are unaffected.
settingsFontRemoveError: Couldn't remove the font. Try again.
settingsFontLicense: You are fully responsible for font licensing. By uploading, you confirm you hold the rights to use this font for printing badges.
settingsApiKeysSubtitle: Integrate registration forms or your CRM — push attendees and read check-in status for this event.
settingsKeysEmpty: No API keys yet — create one to push attendees from your registration forms or CRM.
settingsKeyRevokeBody: Integrations using this key stop working immediately.
settingsKeyRevokeError: Couldn't revoke the key. Try again.
settingsKeyShownOnce: The full key is shown once at creation — store it safely. Revoking is immediate.
settingsKeyRevealWarning: This is the only time the key is shown.
settingsDeleteEventBody: Attendees, check-in history and the badge design — gone. Typed confirmation required.
settingsDeleteConfirmBody: Deletes all attendees, check-in history and the badge design. This cannot be undone.
settingsDeleteError: Couldn't delete the event. Please try again.
tenantSuspendedBody: Your events and attendee data are safe — nothing is deleted.
orgReadOnlyNotice: Only organization admins can edit these settings.
orgForbiddenError: Only organization admins can save changes.
attendeesEmptyBody: Import your guest list from a CSV, or add people one by one. Check-in can't open until someone is on the list.
attendeesSelectAllLabel: Select all attendees on this page
bulkDeleteConfirmBody: Their check-in history disappears with them. This cannot be undone.
bulkDeleteError: Some attendees couldn't be deleted. Try again.
bulkPrintLocked: Print badges — coming with the badge editor
addAttendeeNameRequired: Enter at least a first or last name.
addAttendeeServerError: Couldn't add the attendee. Try again.
drawerReprintLocked: Reprint badge — coming with the badge editor
